primaryItems.label: Full transaction export
primaryItems.draftChaseWording: Please provide Full transaction export (see MG6C/FRD/02) or confirm in writing why it is not available.
primaryItems.whyItMatters: Full transaction export or source banking records outstanding per MG6C.

primaryItems.label: Source banking records
primaryItems.draftChaseWording: Please provide Source banking records (see MG6C/FRD/03) or confirm in writing why it is not available.
primaryItems.whyItMatters: Full transaction export or source banking records outstanding per MG6C.

primaryItems.label: Beneficiary tracing report
primaryItems.draftChaseWording: Please provide Beneficiary tracing report (see MG6C/FRD/04) or confirm in writing why it is not available.
primaryItems.whyItMatters: Outstanding on current disclosure — confirm before fixing hearing position.

primaryItems.label: Subscriber / account data
primaryItems.draftChaseWording: Please provide Subscriber / account data (see MG6C/FRD/05) or confirm in writing why it is not available.

safeCourtLine: The defence asks the court to record per MG6C that bank statement summaries are served but full transaction export, source banking records, and tracing material remain outstanding.
